title: Phase 1 Feat Description Fill Gaps
purpose: Identify feat pack entries whose descriptions still need to be filled in or refreshed after the feat-description update pass.

criteria.filled: Description has the swse-feat-description wrapper, reference/source data, and an Effect section.
criteria.missing_description: system.description.value is empty or renders as empty text.
criteria.summary_only_or_legacy_stub: Description exists but is legacy/plain text, usually matching benefit or shortSummary, and lacks full reference/source/prerequisite/effect sections.
criteria.legacy_unstructured_description: Description exists and is longer than a stub, but is not refreshed into the expected structured format.
criteria.incomplete_refreshed_description: Description has refreshed markers but is missing an expected structured section, usually the Effect heading/body.

needsDescriptionFillIn.name: Flèche
needsDescriptionFillIn.shortSummary: When Charging, turn any natural attack roll of 17+ into a Critical Hit.
needsDescriptionFillIn.benefit: When Charging, turn any natural attack roll of 17+ into a Critical Hit.
reasons: Description was refreshed but is missing expected structured sections.

section.
